info.name: THCWebsite3.0 Admin Panel API
info.description:
Import-ready collection generated from routes/api.php and controller validation rules.

1. Run the `Auth / Login` request first.
2. It will automatically save the returned Sanctum token into the `bearer_token` collection variable.
3. Update the placeholder IDs only after you create records in your environment.

Protected endpoints also require matching role/permission access in the application.
